name: Escape from the Forest
short_description: "Escape from the Forest" tells the story of a little boy who gets lost in a magical forest. You will play the role of this little boy, seeking the help of other people in the forest and fighting against the monsters in the forest.
detailed_description:
Game Background: "Escape from the Forest" tells the story of a little boy who gets lost in a fantastical forest. You will play as this little boy, seeking the help of other people in the forest and fighting against the monsters within it.

Game Genre: This game is a 2D pixel-style RPG. You will control the little boy to explore in this 2D forest and find a way to escape from it.

Gameplay: Defeat the monsters in the forest, help NPCs complete corresponding tasks, make different choices and attempts to achieve different endings.

Game Endings: This game has multiple endings. Different decisions made by players will affect the game endings. We encourage players to try multiple times to discover different endings.

Game Difficulty: The game has a certain level of difficulty. Once the character dies, all saved games will be cleared. Therefore, you need to allocate gold coins and resources rationally in order to achieve different endings.

supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*, Russian*
*languages with full audio support
